creator: fabian.freyer@physik.tu-berlin.de
text:
After this port was marked BROKEN in ports r476365, DEPRECATED in ports r478728 and removed in ports r484289 (sorry!) - here's a patch that allows this port to build on modern GCCs.

There is an upstream efforts at https://github.com/rumpkernel/rumprun/pull/127.

See review D18750
